Meaning.En: A strategic two-player board game played on an 8x8 checkered board, where each player controls 16 pieces (including a king, queen, rooks, bishops, knights, and pawns) with the objective of checkmating the opponent’s king.
Meaning.Example: He has been playing chess since he was five years old.

Situation.Vi: Trò chơi trí tuệ hai người chơi trên bàn cờ 64 ô, với mục tiêu chiếu hết vua đối phương.
Situation.En: A two-player strategic game on a 64-square board, where the goal is to checkmate the opponent’s king.

Situation.Vi: Các giải đấu cờ vua quốc tế như Olympiad hay World Chess Championship.
Situation.En: International chess competitions such as the Chess Olympiad or the World Chess Championship.
